com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXShield

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXAbstractConductor, IXActiveObject, IXConnectivityObject, IXLibrariedObject, IXObject, IXWriteableObject

    public interface IXShield
extends IXAbstractConductor, IXActiveObject
    Interface for accessing the signal and harness levels of a shield.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Collection<IXVariance> attributeVariances()
      Get attribute variances
      java.util.Set<? extends IXConductorVariant> getConductorVariants()
      Retrieve information about the variants of a conductor when the signal map of its start and/or end connector associates the conductor with multiple cavities.
      IXHarness getHarness()
      Get the harness containing this shield.
      java.util.Set<IXHarnessLevel> getHarnessLevels()
      Get the harness levels on which this shield is included.
      IXSignal getSignal()
      Get the signal implemented by this shield.
      boolean isPokeHomePin(IXAbstractPin pin)
      Find if the Shield is poked at the pin.
      java.util.Collection<IXVariance> propertyVariances()
      Get property variances

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXAbstractConductor

        getAbstractPins, getMulticore

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXConnectivityObject

        getAssembly, getDesign, getInstances, getInstances

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXWriteableObject

        getAttributeSetter

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXObject

        getAttribute, getAttributes, getBaseID, getID, getParentID, getProperties, getProperty, getSymbol, toHTML, toHTML

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXLibrariedObject

        getLibraryObject

    • Method Detail

      • getSignal

        IXSignal getSignal()
        Get the signal implemented by this shield. This method only has relevance if the shield is in a Capital Integrator design.
        Returns:
        the signal implemented by this shield if it exists, null otherwise.

      • getHarness

        IXHarness getHarness()
        Get the harness containing this shield. This method only has relevance if the shield is in a Capital Integrator design.
        Returns:
        the harness containing this shield if it exists, null otherwise.

      • getHarnessLevels

        java.util.Set<IXHarnessLevel> getHarnessLevels()
        Get the harness levels on which this shield is included. This method only has relevance if the shield is in a Capital Integrator design.
        Returns:
        a set of harness levels on which this shield exists if any, an empty set otherwise.

      • getConductorVariants

        java.util.Set<? extends IXConductorVariant> getConductorVariants()
        Retrieve information about the variants of a conductor when the signal map of its start and/or end connector associates the conductor with multiple cavities. Note that this method only has relevance if the conductor exists in a Capital Integrator design.
        Returns:
        The variances (the empty set if there are no variances).

      • propertyVariances

        java.util.Collection<IXVariance> propertyVariances()
        Get property variances
        Returns:
        a Collection of current property variances

      • attributeVariances

        java.util.Collection<IXVariance> attributeVariances()
        Get attribute variances
        Returns:
        a Collection of current attribute variances

      • isPokeHomePin

        boolean isPokeHomePin(IXAbstractPin pin)
        Find if the Shield is poked at the pin.
        Parameters:
        pin - is the value upon which the wire is tested for poke home.
        Returns:
        true if the Shield is poked at the pin otherwise false
